title: Thoughts and things 1/19/24 — Sam, lynchpin, lonely
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir post-A Little Life read, mid-Sam-arc: takes Sam on an escape-room + fancy-dinner + Squirrel's Tavern date and reads her body language as "there as a responsibility" — not leaning in, not reciprocating.
  • The night ends in beerball at the house and a humiliating curb-drop high-five after Claudine's bar line — "a fucking high five after months of talking and some good memories."
  • Suspicion of Kyle crystallizing — Yahir clocks Kyle as a Sam-default-target and recalls Sam's blackout-drunk asking "if Paige would be mad if you proceeded in any way with kyle" without recognizing it was Yahir she was asking.
  • First explicit lynchpin question of the vault: "Is finding a lynchpin the correct battle?" — the frame that anchors years of subsequent Emily, Sam, and Austin writing.
  • Catalogs the loneliness ledger: parents eternal, Emilio for-sure, Jipp "may slip away", David "has slipped away" (this is 9 months before David kills himself) — a documented foreshadowing.

Key beats

  • Mind-penis disconnect noted as a new bodily concern with Sam — "two times… literally couldn't get a fully erect boner" — Yahir attributes uncertainly to alcohol or "something else."
  • Lynchpin definition forming: someone who makes you "feel warm wanted and necessary" but explicitly not "someone that will make you whole" — flags whole-making as a "trap that my dad fell into." Direct linkage to Yahir's dad and the Jan 4 dad note.
  • The Jo comparison: Jo "stopped feeling you after less than a week"; Sam "has never really liked you." The pattern Yahir is starting to name: "the connection I have with women so far has always seemed to be misaligned."
  • Honest list at end includes "I had a thought that I probably won't find my lynch pin at OSU" — proto-Austin departure logic, ~20 months before the Austin move.
  • Names Ayden, Riley, Owen, Kyle, Jipp, Emilio, Paige, Hayden Bence, John Smith (wrestling, not the OSU CS prof), David, Jo as the friend-circle map.

Privacy

  • All named persons here are first-name or first-name-known-people already in the vault. No new sensitive PII surfaced beyond what existed.

Relations

  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state — same emotional week, dad + Vic + Sam
  • 2024 01 05 thoughts on 1523 grey hairs paige — 14 days later, Paige situation foregrounded
  • 2024 04 27 sam breakup script — the eventual Sam breakup
  • 2024 10 13 Davids suicide — David's death, pre-foreshadowed here
  • lynchpin life companion — first explicit named question
  • the emily arc — the lynchpin search continues into the Emily era
